description: Patient-level data splits for brain MRI anomaly detection. Anomaly cases are sourced from the fastMRI+ dataset. Normal (healthy) cases used for training are sourced from both the fastMRI and IXI datasets; normal cases used for validation and testing are sourced from fastMRI+. For anomaly cases and normal evaluation cases, the 'best_slice_index' identifies the single representative 2D slice used for anomaly scoring (0-indexed). Training normal patients contribute all available slices.

training.description: Normal (healthy) subjects used for unsupervised anomaly model training. All slices per patient are used.

validation.description: Normal (healthy) fastMRI+ subjects used during model validation. One representative slice per patient.

test_normal.description: Normal (healthy) fastMRI+ subjects used in the held-out test set. One representative slice per patient.

test_anomaly.description: Anomalous fastMRI+ subjects grouped by pathology label. Each case contributes one best-slice for anomaly detection evaluation.
